'''Dara Gion''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
She was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and served in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] as the Personnel Officer of the [[Oracle Base]]. She also served as the liaison between the Special Ops Mission Groups and Brak sector Command.

Prior to joining the Rebellion, she attended the [[Bacrana Educational Institute]] where she met [[Equa Felens]]. The two fell in love and later participated in an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] [[Amma protest|protest]] on [[Bacrana/Legends|Bacrana]] which was ruined by the thousands of [[Death/Legends|deaths]] that were initiated by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Lesan Ramier]]. The couple eventually joined the Rebel Alliance with help of [[Trep Reskan]] and the [[Bacrana System Defense Force]] but later drifted apart.
